title: Slavic Mythology: Morana and the Cycle of Death
description: The Slavic goddess of death and winter, burned in effigy each spring to ensure the return of life.
introduction: The Slavic goddess of death and winter, burned in effigy each spring to ensure the return of life.

translation.text: Morana rules in winter, but when spring comes, her effigy is burned and drowned, and the earth lives again.
